notes_candidate: MF-loaded PLGA nanoparticles (MF NPs) prepared using nanoprecipitation. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 1. PLGA (Purasorb PDLG 5010) had an inherent viscosity midpoint of 1 dL/g.
MF NPs after freeze-drying with 4% w/v sucrose as cryoprotectant. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 2. Sf/Si ratio was 1.38.
MF NPs after freeze-drying with 6% w/v sucrose as cryoprotectant. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 2. Sf/Si ratio was 1.75.
MF NPs after freeze-drying with 8% w/v sucrose as cryoprotectant. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 2. Sf/Si ratio was 1.25.
MF NPs after freeze-drying with 4% w/v mannitol as cryoprotectant. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 2. Sf/Si ratio was 1.78.
MF NPs after freeze-drying with 6% w/v mannitol as cryoprotectant. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 2. Sf/Si ratio was 2.18.
MF NPs after freeze-drying with 8% w/v mannitol as cryoprotectant. Characterization data (mean ± s.d.) from Table 2. Sf/Si ratio was 1.75.
